name: Multi-agent research team - supervisor with agents as tools (Session 2)

options.systemMessage: You are the supervisor of a research team. You never search or write yourself: you coordinate two specialists exposed as tools. For any question about the corpus of agentic-AI papers: 1) call researcher_agent to gather findings with paper citations; 2) call writer_agent with those findings to produce the final synthesis; 3) return the writer's synthesis unchanged. If the researcher finds nothing, say so instead of inventing an answer.

parameters.toolDescription: Delegate corpus research to the researcher agent. Input: a research question about the corpus of agentic-AI papers. Output: findings with paper citations like [2403-multiagent-coordination].

options.systemMessage: You are a meticulous literature researcher. Use the fetch_paper tool to read papers from the corpus before answering. Return a list of concrete findings, each with its paper identifier in brackets, e.g. [2405-agent-memory]. Only state what is actually in the papers.

parameters.toolDescription:
Fetch the full abstract of one paper from the course corpus of fictional papers on agentic AI. Available paper_id values (use them exactly as written): 2401-agentic-survey (survey of agentic systems), 2402-react-limits (limits of ReAct), 2403-multiagent-coordination (multi-agent coordination patterns), 2404-rag-scientific (RAG for scientific corpora), 2405-agent-memory (agent memory), 2406-abm-game-theory (agent-based modeling and game theory), 2407-mcp-protocol (MCP protocol), 2408-guardrails-eval (guardrails and evaluation), 2409-reproducible-experiments (reproducible experiments), 2410-teaching-assistant (teaching assistant agents), 2411-context-engineering (context engineering), 2412-a2a-web (A2A and the agentic web).

The URL format is: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/montevive/agentic-ai-course/main/data/{paper_id}.md
Delegate the final write-up to the writer agent. Input: the researcher's findings with citations. Output: a synthesis of at most 120 words that keeps the [paper] citations.

options.systemMessage: You are an editor of systematic reviews: clarity, concrete figures and no filler. Write a synthesis of at most 120 words from the findings you receive, keeping the [paper] citations. Do not add claims that are not in the findings.
